validation.stringMinLength: String length must be at least {min}
validation.stringMaxLength: String length must be at most {max}
validation.numberStep: Number does not match step requirement (step: {step}). Closest valid values: {values}
validation.enumSchema: Enum schema must have options array
validation.arrayMinItems: Array must have at least {min} items
validation.arrayMaxItems: Array must have at most {max} items
validation.fileSizeMax: File size must be at most {max} bytes
validation.fileFormatInvalid: File format must be one of: {formats}
validation.mutexParams: Parameters {params} are mutually exclusive. Only one of them can be provided.
validation.conditionalRequiredAny: Parameter "{param}" is required when "{when}" is provided
validation.conditionalRequiredList: Parameter "{param}" is required when "{when}" is one of: {values}
